title: Vazhvanthol waterfalls
tagline: Vazhvanthol waterfalls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Vazhvanthol Waterfalls is a scenic waterfalls located inside Peppara wildlife sanctuary in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala state, India.
overview.description: Vazhvanthol Waterfalls is a scenic waterfalls located inside Peppara wildlife sanctuary in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala state, India. It is situated around 46 km (29 mi) from Thiruvananthapuram on the way to Bonacaud.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Peppara Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: The Peppara Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala, India. It consists of the catchment area of the Karamana River, which originates from Chemmunjimottai, the tallest hill within the sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Peppara Dam
topPlaces.description: Peppara Dam is a masonry gravity dam on the Karamana River in Thiruvananthapuram District. It is built by the Kerala Water Authority in 1983 has a catchment area of 83 km2 and receives an average rain fall of 481 cm.

topPlaces.name: Vithura
topPlaces.description: Vithura, also known as the Hill City Of Thiruvananthapuram, is located 36 km from Thiruvananthapuram capital of the Kerala state in India. Vithura is the culmination of the crossroads to many tourist, cultural, and religious centres.

topPlaces.name: Meenankal
topPlaces.description: Meenankal is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India, and located around 5 kilometers away from the Peppara Wildlife Sanctuary. Meenankal has border with Uzhamalakkal, Vellanad, Anad, Kuttichal, Vithura, Tholickode panchayaths and Thiruneveli District of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Memala
topPlaces.description: Memala is a small village in Puramattom panchayat, Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India. The Peppara dam is near Memala.

topPlaces.name: Bonacaud
topPlaces.description: Bonacaud (Kerala state, India) is the base station of the famous peak, Agasthyarkoodam in the Agasthya hills. The Agasthya hill range is famous for its abundance of rare herbs and medicinal plants.

items.note: The Peppara Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala, India. It consists of the catchment area of the Karamana River, which originates from Chemmunjimottai, the tallest hill within the sanctuary.

Peppara Dam is a masonry gravity dam on the Karamana River in Thiruvananthapuram District. It is built by the Kerala Water Authority in 1983 has a catchment area of 83 km2 and receives an average rain fall of 481 cm.

Vithura, also known as the Hill City Of Thiruvananthapuram, is located 36 km from Thiruvananthapuram capital of the Kerala state in India. Vithura is the culmination of the crossroads to many tourist, cultural, and religious centres.

Meenankal is a village in Thiruvananthapuram district in the state of Kerala, India, and located around 5 kilometers away from the Peppara Wildlife Sanctuary. Meenankal has border with Uzhamalakkal, Vellanad, Anad, Kuttichal, Vithura, Tholickode panchayaths and Thiruneveli District of Tamil Nadu, India.
Memala is a small village in Puramattom panchayat, Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India. The Peppara dam is near Memala.
Bonacaud (Kerala state, India) is the base station of the famous peak, Agasthyarkoodam in the Agasthya hills. The Agasthya hill range is famous for its abundance of rare herbs and medicinal plants.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vazhvanthol waterfalls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vazhvanthol waterfalls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vazhvanthol waterfalls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vazhvanthol waterfalls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vazhvanthol waterfalls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vazhvanthol waterfalls?
faq.a: Stays in Vazhvanthol waterfalls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vazhvanthol waterfalls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Peppara Wildlife Sanctuary, Peppara Dam, Vithura, Meenankal, Memala.
